docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHELE MCGILL FILED BY PALAIMA, ARNAS LE, TAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,495.00 FILED BY PALAIMA, ARNAS AS TO DEFENDANT LE, TAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00) SERVED OCT-03-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LE, TAN
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO TAN LE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-05-2013 AT 10:00 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALAIMA, ARNAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,075.00, DEFENDANT TAN LE WAS NAMED IN ERROR AND IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CORRECT DEFENDANT IS EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMOTIV LIFESCIENCES INC.---CEO WAS REPRESENTATED BY TAN LE. DEFENDANT EMOTIV ETC. WAS ADDED AS A DEFENDANT AT THE TIME OF THE HEARING. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LE, TAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2013 - JUDGMENT.
